examples: Many of Amichai's poems have been translated into Nepali.
Culture is the main focus of Nepali tourism business.
The young Nepali shares a room with nine of his countrymen.
For comparison, climbing fees for Nepal's other mountains range from about 18, 000 to 38, 000 Nepali rupees.
To pay for the processing and facilities, climbers pay a tax of 1, 000 Nepali rupees per kilogram.
